seo.title: Seb Jauslin — Executive Coaching & Leadership Workshops
seo.description: ICF PCC certified executive coaching and corporate leadership workshops for senior teams and HR professionals across Zürich, Geneva, London, Málaga and Dubai.

hero.headline:
When your leaders grow,
everything grows
with them.
hero.subtitle: Executive coaching and corporate leadership workshops for senior teams, HR directors and L&D professionals across Europe and Dubai.

items.title: Your leaders are running on empty
items.body: As expectations rise and support stays flat, senior leaders burn out quietly. Turnover at the top spikes, culture fragments, and your leadership pipeline becomes thinner than your strategy can afford.

items.title: Your teams aren't moving fast enough
items.body: Communication breakdowns, stalled decisions, invisible politics. When leaders lack the tools to connect and align their teams, the whole organisation slows. Talent disengages before you notice.

items.title: Change is exposing the capability gap
items.body: Reorganisations, new mandates, shifting markets. Leaders who cannot navigate uncertainty become bottlenecks rather than accelerators. Only 23% of leaders rate their development as high quality.

programs.headline:
Three depths of
leadership development.
programs.intro: The Be · Do · Have framework is a structured progression from leadership identity to leadership practice to lasting organisational impact. Each tier is a standalone engagement — or part of a longer transformation.

items.name: BE
items.description: Clarity — understanding who you are as a leader. The foundation for everything that follows.
features: Reveal your Motivation Drivers and Killers
Identify Blind Spots, Triggers and Strengths
Overcome the fears limiting your growth

items.name: DO
items.description: Capability — how you lead others. Build the trust, communication and influence that high-performing teams require.

items.name: HAVE
items.description: Impact — shaping culture across the organisation. For leaders ready to build a legacy that outlasts them.
features: Develop your Mission, Vision and Values
Develop future leaders within your team
Connect work to a larger organisational purpose

programs.footerText: Not sure which tier fits your organisation?

workshops.headline: Half-day and full-day workshops designed for leadership teams.
workshops.intro: Practical, high-trust sessions that help leadership teams align, communicate and move through change together.

items.name: Leading Through Change
items.description: Equip your leadership team to guide transformation, uncertainty and disruption without losing trust or momentum.

items.name: Leading Across Borders
items.description: Develop cross-cultural communication and leadership skills for global organisations with distributed teams.

items.name: Powerful Conversations
items.description: Frameworks for senior leaders who need to manage conflict and deliver feedback that lands.

items.name: Women in Leadership
items.description: Practical tools, peer learning and sustainable frameworks for women leaders in complex organisations.

items.name: Trusted Leaders
items.description: Build high-trust leadership culture through accountability and psychological safety frameworks that stick.

photos.alt: Leading Through Change workshop in Zürich
photos.caption: Leading Through Change · Zürich

about.headline:
Leadership experience
built inside the system.
bio: Seb Jauslin is an ICF PCC Certified Leadership Coach who partners with purpose-driven organisations to build leadership capability that holds under pressure.

His background spans law, the United Nations and the Swiss Federal Government — where he saw firsthand how conformity stifles leadership and accelerates burnout. That experience led him to build a coaching practice grounded in evidence-based methodology and real executive experience.
He works with senior teams across Zürich, Geneva, London and Málaga, and expanded his practice to Dubai in 2026 to support leadership development in high-growth, culturally complex environments.

items.quote: Seb showed a strong ability to tailor his approach to the specific challenges of my sector. He quickly creates a space of trust and confidence, and his follow-up helped me stay focused and make progress.
items.name: Luca Guanziroli

items.quote: Working with Seb has been a truly transformative experience. His insightful guidance helped me gain confidence, understand my strengths and take meaningful steps toward my career goals.
items.name: Maéva Roemer

items.quote: From the very first workshop, I knew Seb was someone different. He brings a different meaning to what a workshop can be, creating an environment where people feel safe, engaged and inspired.
items.name: Carlota Bello Suárez
items.role: Key Account & Customer Supply Chain Leader

items.quote: Through my sessions with Seb, I gained confidence, clarity about who I am as a leader, and tools to make bold moves aligned with my values. His empathetic approach made me more empowered.
items.name: Sandrine Zeferino

items.quote: Seb cuts straight to the heart of what's holding you back. He helped me gain awareness of my professional value and move through complex relational hurdles with a focused, calm mindset.
items.name: Federica Gilardoni

items.quote: Seb's coaching helped me turn reflection into practical action. His questions created clarity, strengthened my confidence and helped me lead with more presence in demanding situations.
items.name: Beata Brozowski
items.role: Director · Global Sanctions & Financial Crime Compliance

items.quote: From the beginning, Seb established an atmosphere of trust that allowed me to explore my leadership journey with clarity and confidence. The exercises were insightful and immediately impactful.
items.name: Axelle Figard
items.role: Executive Manager · The Estée Lauder Companies
